steps.title: Identify the finding
steps.content: After Deezer restricted free-tier streaming to 5 hours/month, the affected listeners purchased music (legal or otherwise) about $2\%$ less, not more. So restricting streaming caused users to buy less music — the opposite of what one might expect.

steps.title: Match the logical conclusion
steps.content:
Choice B captures this counterintuitive result: streaming restrictions can actually suppress users' interest in owning music. A misstates the finding (it's about purchasing, not user count), C is unsupported by the evidence, and D draws a conclusion the data doesn't address.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
